objective: Exercise the pr_review_packet candidate template with a minimal valid instance.

sections.PR_SCOPE: Review candidate PR #128 updating the authentication middleware and generated lockfile.

DIFF_SUMMARY.change: adds tenant header parsing and fallback branch
dependency tree changed after auth library upgrade

RISK_AREAS: tenant spoofing risk if header trust boundary is not explicit
lockfile drift risk because dependency upgrade affects transitive packages
CI coverage gap if middleware tests omit malformed headers

REVIEW_COMMENTS.comment: Please document and test the tenant-header trust boundary before merge.
Lockfile changed; attach dependency diff or package-manager receipt.

MERGE_BLOCKERS: trust-boundary test absent for malformed/forged tenant header
NON_CLAIMS: Review comments are candidate feedback, not accepted code changes.
Merge readiness is not claimed because security evidence is missing.
sections.SETTLEMENT_ROUTE: PR_REVIEW_STEWARD -> SECURITY_NEMESIS for blocker review -> human merge gate.

proves: required section shape can be satisfied

non_claims: This instance is candidate current-context test data, not accepted template law.
This instance does not execute external tools or mutate production state.
